content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
RISK-ON: Low volatility (Vol: 19.7%) and broad participation with breadth 8/8 sectors positive; bullish market internals are intact. Market is favoring cyclicals and high-beta names.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Energy & Chemicals ABOVE TREND: HEKTS (1W: +29.45% | 1M: +54.17%) and SASA (1W: +12.10% | 1M: +44.86%) are driving the move. Retail & Food ABOVE TREND: CCOLA (1W: +15.53% | 1M: +29.33%) and BIMAS (1W: +6.54% | 1M: +15.24%) are strong contributors.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Transportation is the weakest relative performer but still positive: THYAO (1W: +0.89% | 1M: +6.51%) ABOVE TREND and TAVHL (1W: +1.97% | 1M: -9.19%) RECOVERY. TUPRS (1W: -4.61% | 1M: -0.58%) is an outlier in Energy & Chemicals and sits BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
HEKTS (1W: +29.45% | 1M: +54.17%) ABOVE TREND, EREGL (1W: +17.48% | 1M: +43.07%) ABOVE TREND, CCOLA (1W: +15.53% | 1M: +29.33%) ABOVE TREND, GUBRF (1W: +14.42% | 1M: +28.06%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +12.10% | 1M: +44.86%) ABOVE TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
TUPRS (1W: -4.61% | 1M: -0.58%) BELOW TREND, FROTO (1W: -0.51% | 1M: +0.83%) CORRECTION, KONTR (1W: -0.19% | 1M: +33.55%) CORRECTION, OYAKC (1W: -0.17% | 1M: +0.60%) CORRECTION, THYAO (1W: +0.89% | 1M: +6.51%) ABOVE TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
HEKTS (1W: +29.45% | 1M: +54.17%) ABOVE TREND, EREGL (1W: +17.48% | 1M: +43.07%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +8.20% | 1M: +62.25%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +12.10% | 1M: +44.86%) ABOVE TREND, CCOLA (1W: +15.53% | 1M: +29.33%) ABOVE TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banking is constructive but tame: AKBNK (1W: +2.80% | 1M: +8.66%) ABOVE TREND, GARAN (1W: +2.62% | 1M: +8.03%) ABOVE TREND, ISCTR (1W: +1.46% | 1M: +11.07%) ABOVE TREND — selective exposure to higher beta names preferred.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy Industry keeps leading on cyclicality: EREGL (1W: +17.48% | 1M: +43.07%) ABOVE TREND and TOASO (1W: +8.74% | 1M: +27.08%) ABOVE TREND; watch FROTO (1W: -0.51% | 1M: +0.83%) CORRECTION for short-term divergence.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Sector is a clear leader overall but mixed internally: SASA (1W: +12.10% | 1M: +44.86%) ABOVE TREND and GUBRF (1W: +14.42% | 1M: +28.06%) ABOVE TREND, while TUPRS (1W: -4.61% | 1M: -0.58%) BELOW TREND and OYAKC (1W: -0.17% | 1M: +0.60%) CORRECTION warrant caution.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Risk-on stance: overweight Energy & Chemicals, Heavy Industry and selective Retail; trim laggards and names showing short-term cracks (TUPRS, FROTO). Keep core exposure to Banks for stability and take profits on extreme momentum names after rebalancing.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
HEKTS (1W: +29.45% | 1M: +54.17%) ABOVE TREND for momentum/fade risk, EREGL (1W: +17.48% | 1M: +43.07%) ABOVE TREND for continuation, TKFEN (1W: +8.20% | 1M: +62.25%) ABOVE TREND for order-flow, and TUPRS (1W: -4.61% | 1M: -0.58%) BELOW TREND for downside risk.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Energy & Chemicals for leadership rotation and profit-taking, Heavy Industry for continued cyclical upside, Retail for resilient consumption signals.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch market internals — a 3–5% pullback in XU100 would mark a tactical buying window while failure to hold short-term highs would signal profit-taking across high-beta names. Monitor CBRT communications, FX moves, global risk sentiment and oil/commodity prices as primary catalysts.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
RISK-ON market with low volatility and all sectors positive; cyclicals and high-beta energy/industrial names are leading. Opportunities in Energy & Chemicals and Heavy Industry, but watch TUPRS and individual names showing short-term divergences for tactical trimming.
